description: Reference-only high-pressure subset for explicit KV offload sweeps. No new bundles are added; entries point at existing converted traces.

entries.rationale: 1M coding replay that stays far beyond Hopper/Blackwell single-session KV budgets; use it to force preemption and swap activity quickly.
500K hot/cold coding mix that surfaces partial-residency churn before the full 1M cliff, useful for intermediate cpu-offload settings.
131K shared-prefix coding swarm that isolates reuse-vs-offload tradeoffs without needing the preview lanes.
